/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sixseven_backend.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sixseven_backend.dir/main.cpp.o -o sixseven_backend  /home/arthur/.local/lib/libdrogon.a libbcrypt.a /home/arthur/.local/lib/libtrantor.a -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.6 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmariadbclient.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
